canonical_definition: An English benchmark consisting of 100 multi-party conversations and 6.7K questions designed to evaluate LLMs’ understanding of white lies, including mental state tracking, justification, and reasoning about prosocial deception.
papers: Causal Interventions Reveal Shared Structure AcrossEnglish Filler–Gap Constructions

definitions.text: An English benchmark consisting of 100 multi-party conversations and 6.7K questions designed to evaluate LLMs’ understanding of white lies, including mental state tracking, justification, and reasoning about prosocial deception.
definitions.paper: Causal Interventions Reveal Shared Structure AcrossEnglish Filler–Gap Constructions

relationships.paper: Causal Interventions Reveal Shared Structure AcrossEnglish Filler–Gap Constructions
relationships.evidence: "a comprehensive evaluation framework to test models’ understanding of white lies by combining mental state tracking questions with both established measures from Strange Stories (Happé, 1994) and our newly designed question types"
